evidence: Core functions like Renderer::encode_ui_overlay (src/gpu_renderer.rs) have multiple distinct responsibilities, handling everything from the status bar to the histogram and EXIF display in one body.
The SpedImageApp::process_events function (src/app/events.rs) suffers from deep nesting and mixed concerns, coordinating directory logic, renderer state, and UI updates.
Abstraction leverage is high, but the cost is high complexity in the central hub modules (Renderer, SpedImageApp).

issues.summary: UI encoding function combines multiple independent overlay rendering tasks
evidence: Renderer::encode_ui_overlay manages text layout, strip rendering, and histogram drawing in a single procedural flow.
issues.suggestion: Extract specialized painters (StatusPainter, HistogramPainter, etc.) to handle their own rendering commands.

root_causes: Immediate UI implementation needs led to appending logic to the main overlay function.
likely_symptoms: Ripple effects when changing the layout or behavior of one UI component.
